title: [Brayern Isle, Jungle Path]
description: Carved-out hollows line a path along a sheer cliff that divides jungle plateaus along the volcanic mountain.  Massive, onyx-hued boulders punctuate the lush treescape below, remaining where they have landed since dislodging from higher altitudes.  A strung rope and a small sign next to the edge separate travelers from a high dive.  A series of stone lanterns are suspended along the cliff face.  A rope ladder anchored to the rock face leads to a narrow platform above.
